title: hieracium subgracilentipes
intro: Hieracium subgracilentipes, also known as hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), characterized by its yellow flowers and a sprawling habit. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and combat bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Hieracium subgracilentipes include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion, making it a popular herb for treating a range of health issues. Hieracium subgracilentipes can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and effectiveness.
